limitations: Phase is source-inspected at the pinned revision; it is not built or executed by blocking manabot CI.
A match means the cited sources establish the same normalized case, not whole-engine or whole-card parity.
Generated Phase card data and broad non-curated formats are outside this matrix.

rows.normalized_assertion: Suki's two hybrid pips preserve hybrid payment choices.
rows.manabot_outcome: The admitted runtime registers {2}{G}{W}; one green and one white source are required.
rows.phase_outcome: The pinned typed card representation preserves the printed {2}{G/W}{G/W} hybrid cost.

rows.normalized_assertion: An identical curated activated-ability scenario reaches the same state.
rows.exclusion_reason: No exact pinned Phase scenario receipt for the curated Clue, waterbend, or Cadets activation was available without importing generated Phase card assets.

rows.normalized_assertion: A legal spell command is applied to authoritative state before the next external decision.
rows.manabot_outcome: Game::step applies the selected action, stabilizes rules state, and publishes the next prompt.
rows.phase_outcome: The pinned engine apply entry point mutates authoritative GameState from an actor action.

rows.normalized_assertion: An identical curated simultaneous-trigger scenario commits the same order.
rows.exclusion_reason: Phase trigger support is broad, but no identical pinned two-deck trigger-order trace was extracted for this bounded offline matrix.

rows.normalized_assertion: Printed legendary and characteristic-defining behavior remains active across all relevant zones.
rows.manabot_outcome: The curated runtime omits the legend rule and prints Dragonfly's CDA only on the battlefield.
rows.phase_outcome: The pinned typed card model retains printed supertypes and characteristic definitions independently of battlefield-only runtime projection.

rows.normalized_assertion: The same target inventory is legal for an identical curated position.
rows.exclusion_reason: The engines expose different action and object identifiers, and no normalized pinned Phase target fixture exists for the exact two-deck positions.

rows.normalized_assertion: Fire Nation Cadets uses the printed attack-trigger timing when a Lesson is in the graveyard.
rows.manabot_outcome: The admitted runtime uses a sanctioned on-stack conditional attack-trigger simplification.
rows.phase_outcome: The pinned typed card representation retains the printed trigger and condition structure.

rows.normalized_assertion: Learn and any-order library-bottom choices retain every printed option.
rows.manabot_outcome: Learn is discard-then-draw without a Lesson sideboard, and Accumulate Wisdom bottoms the remainder randomly.
rows.phase_outcome: The pinned typed card model retains printed zone/choice semantics rather than the two sanctioned curated simplifications.

rows.normalized_assertion: The same Ally and Clue token scenario creates identical objects and abilities.
rows.exclusion_reason: The matrix does not import Phase's generated token definitions, so object-level token parity is not asserted.

rows.normalized_assertion: The same multi-object +1/+1 counter scenario reaches identical values.
rows.exclusion_reason: No identical pinned Phase counter trace was extracted for Earth King's Lieutenant or earthbend.

rows.normalized_assertion: Committed positive damage changes the affected rules state and emits a factual damage result.
rows.manabot_outcome: Damage is proposed, replaced, then committed to authoritative state and the event ledger.
rows.phase_outcome: Damage effects are reduced through the pinned authoritative action application path.

rows.normalized_assertion: A committed life delta updates the affected player's authoritative life total exactly once.
rows.manabot_outcome: The proposal pipeline applies one life delta and records old/new values.
rows.phase_outcome: Life effects reduce through the pinned authoritative action application path.

rows.normalized_assertion: The same Tiger-Seal and Fancy Footwork sequence reaches identical tap state.
rows.exclusion_reason: No identical pinned Phase trace for the two curated cards was extracted.

rows.normalized_assertion: Ward triggers for every opponent-controlled spell or ability that targets the permanent.
rows.manabot_outcome: The admitted runtime triggers ward for opposing spells only.
rows.phase_outcome: The pinned typed card representation retains ward's printed spell-or-ability targeting condition.

rows.normalized_assertion: The same earthbend land animation and delayed return trace reaches identical state.
rows.exclusion_reason: Phase's generated TLA card assets are intentionally not imported into this offline gate, so exact earthbend parity is unmeasured.
